mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = p.account_id JOIN vw_account_display d ON d.account_id = a.account_id
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reports r WHERE r.target_type = 'POST' AND r.target_id = p.post_id )
AND d.nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND d.handle LIKE '%' || #{handle} || '%'
AND p.content LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND a.role_type = #{roleType}
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.created_at < TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, a.account_id AS authorAccountId, d.nickname AS nickname, d.handle AS handle, a.role_type AS roleType, p.status AS status, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, p.content AS content,
mp.url AS authorProfileImageUrl
FROM posts p JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = p.account_id JOIN vw_account_display d ON d.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN media_files mp ON mp.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mp.ref_id = a.account_id
WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
SELECT mf.url FROM media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'POST' AND mf.ref_id = #{postId} ORDER BY mf.created_at ASC
SELECT t.tag_text AS text FROM tag_links tl JOIN tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY t.tag_text ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE post_id = #{postId}
